metadata.description: Tools for explaining code and communicating engineering work to reviewers, new hires, and stakeholders.

plugins.name: explain-code
plugins.description: Explain code — a change, a feature, a module, or a whole codebase — as a self-contained HTML page with a test-first gate, brief-by-default sections, and a shuffled quiz.

plugins.name: improvement-plan
plugins.description: Draft a layered, plain-English improvement plan for non-technical or mixed audiences that orders interventions cheapest-first and ends with explicit stakeholder asks.
